name: poulpy-js
description: Browser FHE client and Node evaluator over Squid. `poulpy-js/client` uses wasm; `poulpy-js/server` uses a napi-rs native addon.

scripts.build:napi: napi build --cargo-cwd ../../crates/poulpy-napi --platform --release --js index.js --dts index.d.ts napi && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('napi/package.json', '{\"type\":\"commonjs\"}\n')"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:napi && pnpm run build:ts
